programme.title: Los Alegres Aguilares
programme.desc: El aventurero Manuel se encuentra con Carlos, quien es casi idéntico a él. Uno es de familia rica y el otro no. Entonces Manuel le ofrece dinero a Carlos para que se haga pasar por él con una señorita con la cual no se quiere casar.

programme.title: Los Cuatro Juanes
programme.desc: Los Cuatro famosos Juanes: Juan Colorado, Juan Sin Miedo, Juan Pistolas y Juan Charrasqueado pasan peligrosas aventuras para llevar un importante cargamento de armas y municiones desde Veracruz hasta un pueblo sitiado por las fuerzas del gobierno.

programme.title: Los Dos Rivales
programme.desc: Los Treviño y Los Guereña mantienen una rivalidad originada muchos años atrás. Por necesidad de dinero, el heredero de los Treviño, y la heredera de los Guereña, tienen que disfrazarse usando ropa del sexo opuesto para proteger y vender sus ranchos.

programme.title: Los Alegres Aguilares
programme.desc: El aventurero Manuel se encuentra con Carlos, quien es casi idéntico a él. Uno es de familia rica y el otro no. Entonces Manuel le ofrece dinero a Carlos para que se haga pasar por él con una señorita con la cual no se quiere casar.

programme.title: Acquitted by Faith
programme.desc: El abogado, Benjamin Stills, está a punto de ser sentenciado a prisión y encuentra fe en Dios después de que una adolescente pierde su vida en un accidente automovilístico por enviar mensajes de texto mientras conducía.

programme.title: Pinero
programme.desc: Piñero" cuenta la historia del ícono latino, poeta, dramaturgo y actor Miguel Piñero.

programme.title: La raíz del miedo
programme.desc: Una película de suspenso judicial, acerca de un abogado astuto (Richard Gere) que lleva el caso aparentemente perdido de un monaguillo (Edward Norton), acusado de asesinar a un ilustre sacerdote católico.

programme.title: Desafío
programme.desc: Desafío es una fascinante aventura sobre la extraordinaria historia verdadera de los hermanos Bielski, simples agricultores -independientes y desarmados- que convirtieron a un grupo de refugiados de guerra en poderosos luchadores por la libertad.

programme.title: ¡Madre!
programme.desc: Jennifer Lawrence y Javier Bardem ofrecen actuaciones inolvidables en ¡Madre!, el elogiado trabajo de Darren Aronofsky. ¡Experimenta el suspenso psicológico visualmente deslumbrante que dejará tu corazón latiendo y te volará la cabeza!

programme.title: Último viaje a Las Vegas
programme.desc: Cuatro mejores amigos de toda la vida van a Las Vegas para dejar de portarse como adultos de su edad y revivir sus días de gloria. Al llegar, se dan cuenta de que las décadas transformaron Sin City y pusieron a prueba su amistad de manera impensada.

programme.title: Están todos bien
programme.desc: Cuando los hijos de Frank Goode (Robert DeNiro) cancelan una reunión familiar, el viudo emprende un viaje por el país para reconectarse con ellos. Esperando compartir las alegrías de sus vidas felices, sus visitas revelan una imagen no muy perfecta.

programme.title: Soltera a los 30
programme.desc: Cuando Kate cumple 30 años, sus amigas Evie y Charlie se ofrecen a hacer una fiesta, pero la fiesta se sale de control.

programme.title: Cheri
programme.desc: A una famosa cortesana de ricos y famosos en el París previo a la Primera Guerra Mundial se le pide que enseñe a un niño de 19 años. La aventura que se convierte en un acalorado y apasionado asunto que resulta en luchas de poder y luchas por amor.

programme.title: El magnífico Nicolás
programme.desc: Basada en la obra de Charles Dickens sobre las experiencias de un recién arruinado joven y su familia.

programme.title: Una chica en apuros
programme.desc: Las risas no paran cuando Viola, disfrazada de su hermano gemelo, Sebastian, se une al equipo de fútbol masculino de la escuela secundaria y los ayuda a ganar el gran partido mientras se enamora inesperadamente de Duke, el guapo delantero estrella.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Vivienne (Sarah Jessica Parker) es una cantante reconocida con una carrera musical exitosa. En las vísperas de una gran presentación, Vivienne recibe una sorprendente noticia que hace que reevalúe sus prioridades.

programme.title: Cheri
programme.desc: A una famosa cortesana de ricos y famosos en el París previo a la Primera Guerra Mundial se le pide que enseñe a un niño de 19 años. La aventura que se convierte en un acalorado y apasionado asunto que resulta en luchas de poder y luchas por amor.

programme.title: El magnífico Nicolás
programme.desc: Basada en la obra de Charles Dickens sobre las experiencias de un recién arruinado joven y su familia.

programme.title: Shaolin
programme.desc: En una joven República de China, Hou Jie nos muestra piedad con sus enemigos que buscan refugio con los monjes Shaolin. Hou Jie paga un precio terrible por sus acciones y se ve obligado a buscar refugio en el monasterio de Shaolin.

programme.title: Fled: Corre por tu vida
programme.desc: Una divertida e ingeniosa aventura de acción. Fled sigue el rastro de dos prisioneros fugitivos en su carrera por encontrar un alijo oculto y un disco incriminatorio, que podría terminar con la mafia cubana o matarlos.

programme.title: Redención
programme.desc: Jason Statham interpreta a un cobrador que trabaja para un jefe de la mafia local en este thriller de acción de alto octanaje. Afectado por el asesinato de un amigo y consumido por deseos de venganza, se sumerge en un mundo de violencia.

programme.title: Actos de venganza
programme.desc: Un abogado de hablar rápido (Antonio Banderas) transforma su cuerpo y toma un voto de silencio, que no se romperá hasta que descubra quién mató a su esposa e hija y tenga su venganza.

programme.title: Colateral: Lugar y tiempo equivocado
programme.desc: Vincent es un asesino a sueldo tranquilo y calculador que está en su mejor momento. Max es un taxista con grandes sueños y sin resultados. Esta noche, Max llevará a Vincent a su próximo trabajo. Una noche, cinco paradas, cinco asesinatos y un escape.

programme.title: Blitz
programme.desc: Un policía fuerte (Jason Statham, "Fast & Furious 7") es designado para atrapar a un asesino en serie que ataca a oficiales de policía. Con Paddy Considine, Aiden Gillen, Mark Rylance y Luke Evans.

programme.title: Redención

programme.title: Piedras

programme.title: Cantinflas

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1963

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1963
programme.desc: Two rock samples in Dr. Temple's (Barry Atwater) lab conceal protoplasmic alien invaders capable of controlling a human corpus. Enter Paul Cameron (Robert Culp)...who can telepathically hear the rocks plotting their takeover of the world.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1963
programme.desc: A six-man strike force is captured on the planet Ebon and brutally interrogated. And when they are suddenly allowed the respect due to a conquered enemy, the prisoners conclude that there is a traitor among them...someone who must be killed!

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1963

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1963
programme.desc: In this highly charged, fascinating tale that explores the concept of alternate dimensions, a wealthy industrialist (Barry Jones) attempts to contact his dead son by funding a scientist's experiments in prying open the door to the borderland.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1963
programme.desc: Ralph Meeker and Henry Silva star in this examination of the politics of exploitation as a corporate mercenary (Meeker) and a ruthless dictator (Silva) battle for possession of a recently discovered sea monster. But the monster may have other ideas.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1963
programme.desc: They creep. They crawl. They kill. When the rulers of the planet Zanti are allowed to exile their criminals to our world, the screeching misfits will demonstrate to the military just what the word invasion really means. Bruce Dern stars.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1963
programme.desc: A convict (Henry Silva) who is taking part in an inhabitant exchange between Earth and the planet Chromo discovers that the Chromites have something far more sinister planned and that the fate of the entire planet might just be in his own hands.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1963
programme.desc: Befuddled by the strange local custom of murder, two Martian administrators (Barry Morse and Carroll O'Connor) visit Earth to study one such crime and find themselves tempted to tamper with events in this whimsical tale from The Outer Limits.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1963
programme.desc: Film great Miriam Hopkins (1932's Dr. Jekyll and Mr. Hyde) returns to the screen to give a show-stopping performance as an overly ripe flapper who will stop at nothing to complete her long-overdue wedding night scenario. John Hoyt also stars.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1963

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1963

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1963

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: The hunt for a methodical killer takes the BAU to Arizona to search for an increasingly devolving UnSub, and the team speculates that Hotch is in the running to be the new BAU unit chief.

programme.title: Criminal Minds

programme.desc: The BAU meets their new section chief, Mateo Cruz, who, unbeknownst to them, shares a long work history with JJ. Cruz joins the team as they comb the streets of Baltimore for an UnSub who leaves victims unable to communicate.

programme.desc: When teenagers who were reported missing are suspected of a series of mass murders in Chicago, the BAU investigates their whereabouts to find a motive for the crimes.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2004, Rebecca Barney y su futuro exmarido Fred fueron hallados muertos a tiros en su casa de Tulsa, Oklahoma, la cual había sido incendiada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una joven mujer asiste a los servicios religiosos de la tarde y luego desaparece. Cuando se encuentra su automóvil abandonado, el tanque está vacío y falta una lata de gasolina que tenía en su baúl para emergencias.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Jardín del mal
programme.desc: Cuando un popular disc jockey fue encontrado asesinado en un jardín comunitario, la policía entró en acción.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de un día de pesca en un tranquilo pueblo de Suiza, un adolescente no regresa a casa como se planeó. La investigación revela algunas evidencias microscópicas importantes en el agua cerca de donde fue visto por última vez.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Mientras estaba de vacaciones en California, Earl Morris se entera de que su esposa ha desaparecido de su casa en Arizona. La búsqueda de Ruby Morris involucra a decenas de investigadores y científicos – incluyendo también a la Guardia Costera.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de que aparecen 10 cuerpos en Florida, una víctima – Lisa McVey de 17 años de edad – es secuestrada pero liberada. Ella lleva a la policía al autor del crimen, Bobbie Joe Long.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2000, Christina Sanoubane fue asesinada en su departamento de Cedar Rapids después de dejar a su abusivo novio. Hay pistas en la escena: huellas sangrientas y ADN del kit de violación de la víctima.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pelo de perro
programme.desc: Sin evidencia forense dentro de la escena del crimen, los investigadores estaban desconcertados. Pero sospecharon que el perro de la víctima había sido testigo del crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una niña de 9 años desaparece, la policía y los voluntarios pasan semanas buscándola.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un residente que hacía tiempo vivía en el pequeño pueblo de Lefroy, Tasmania, fue asesinado fuera de su hogar. El robo pareció ser el motivo, pero sin sospechosos, la investigación se detiene.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1997, se encontró el carro de Kelly Eckart, con todas sus pertenencias aún dentro del mismo, después de haber trabajado un turno nocturno en Franklin, Indiana. Días más tarde, se encontró su cuerpo en un barranco aislado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, en Grand Junction, Colorado suceden una serie de bombardeos que matan a dos personas y lastiman a uno más. La policía corre para poder encontrar al culpable antes de que vuelva a atacar.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un asesino en serie andaba suelto y la policía tenía que encontrarlo antes de que atacara nuevamente. Su pista más prometedora era inusual: una huella dactilar sangrienta en el cuerpo de una de las víctimas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1999, Patrick McRae fue encontrado muerto en su casa de Des Moines y la escena del crimen estaba inundada de sangre. El análisis mostró que procedían de dos personas, una de las cuales era mujer.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Usando técnicas que vio en programas de televisión de ciencia forense, una madre determina quién fue el responsable del accidente que hirió permanentemente a su hija de 4 años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra muerta a Wanda Mason, empleada de una tienda, los investigadores descubren que la cámara de seguridad de la tienda ha captado todo el asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1981, la oficial de la correccional de New York, Donna Payant, desapareció y luego fue encontrada en un vertedero. El médico forense no solo identificó la causa de la muerte, sino que también encontró una pista importante.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Crimen limpio
programme.desc: Una empleada de una tintorería fue violada y asesinada en la tienda. La policía recurrió a la ciencia forense en busca de las respuestas que necesitaban.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Susie Mowbray fue acusada de la muerte de su esposo. Su hijo estaba tan convencido de su inocencia que se matriculó en la facultad de derecho, estudió todas las pruebas y, finalmente, descubrió la verdad de lo que realmente sucedió entre sus padres.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se sospecha un juego sucio cuando Glenda Furch, una trabajadora de una fábrica de Fort Worth, desaparece después de completar su turno.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Avis Banks y su hijo no nacido fueron brutalmente asesinados. El cuerpo fue descubierto por su prometido Keyon Pittman. La policía se enteró de que Pittman estaba teniendo aventuras con otras mujeres y se convirtió en el principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Aunque su hija ha escapado antes, ella siempre ha regresado. Sus padres estaban seguros de que esta vez no sería diferente, pero estaban equivocados.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Apenas unas semanas antes de que una testigo testifique contra el hombre acusado de agredirla sexualmente, ella es asesinada en el patio delantero de su propia casa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El sospechoso principal tenía un historial criminal y su licencia de conducir se encontró en la escena del crimen de un brutal homicidio doble.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La policía de California tenía varios sospechosos en el robo y brutal asesinato de una pareja de ancianos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se encontró a Janice Johnson muerta al pie de las escaleras del sótano. La policía de Nueva Escocia tuvo que desenredar las circunstancias que rodearon la muerte de Janice y responder a la pregunta: ¿Fue un accidente o un asesinato?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Ahogamiento seco
programme.desc: Cuando Genell Plude es encontrada muerta en su baño, la escena apunta a un suicidio.

programme.desc: Facing hard time for forging checks, Melissa pulled a vanishing act at her sentencing hearing, bolting from the courthouse in broad daylight. Lucky for her, bondsman Dog and his posse are in Colorado and ready to help.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is busy. First, he's after a fugitive who is allegedly an expert in the game of "burn and return"--shoplifting goods to return them for cash refunds.? But he's not easy to track.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Going after two fugitives in one day is tough enough without the facing Colorado's notoriously unpredictable weather. Today it's the threat of severe thunderstorm, hail and area wide tornado warnings.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It hurts Dog to see people who?after years of walking the straight and narrow, suddenly lose their way. But today's case is a member of the law enforcement community who has recently gone astray, and that truly troubles the Dog.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back in Denver and in hot pursuit of a woman wanted for identity theft. The sad reality is that the identity which has been robbed is her own. She's traded in a bright future for a life on the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Being hunted by the Dog is a lousy way to celebrate your birthday, but that's exactly the spot that Robert finds himself in today. He's missed his court date, quit his job, and vacated his last known address.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Both brother Tim and fellow Honolulu bondsman James need Dog's help to track down their hard to find fugitives. The two cases on the docket today are challenging, especially the hunt for Gregory, a felon with a lengthy rap sheet. A quick check of his

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's Beth's birthday and Dog knows just what she needs. He surprises Beth with Delilah, a puppy small enough to sit in the palm of her hand. Beth is so happy that she insists on taking the puppy with her on today's bounty.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's Halloween, and before Dog and Beth can help the kids carve their pumpkins, they have some business to attend to. It involves knocking on doors and meeting the neighbors, but instead of hunting for treats, they're on the search for a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team have girl trouble in this case. Krystal jumped bail and seems to have vanished into the high plains of Colorado. To make matters worse, she's running with her lover (and bond co-signer) Carrie. But Thelma and Louise they ain't.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today, Leland and Dog make a quick visit to the police supply store to get some new gadgets for the team. But they can't linger because they've also got a fugitive to catch. Their target is reputed to have an explosive temper.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When an offender, with a long record, ducks his day in court, Bobby Brown knows whom to call--The Dog!? And knowing that few souls can resist Beth's clever persuasion, Dog gives her the job of luring the fugitive in.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's case is a twofer, a brother and sister both charged with drug related offenses. Also, Dog has crossed paths with the brother before. He once tried to stop Dog from arresting one of the most violent fugitives of his career.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When a brother bondsman from Washington State calls Dog for help tracking a runner in search of fun in the sun on the tropical paradise of Kauai, the team gets on the case. Dog's only problem? No leads!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and team help out a bondsman friend whose client jumped bail, but the target is a blank slate. Are his tattoos gang related? Is he likely to be violent? And making matters worse, when they hit his apartment, they learn he is moving out.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: They say you can't teach an old dog new tricks, but what if it's The Dog doing the teaching? Today's target is wanted on domestic abuse charges, but when Dog discovers she works for an escort service, he opts for a new twist on an old ruse.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Things get stressful when Dog and the team race to Honolulu International to catch a felon who's booked on an afternoon flight to Florida owing $140,000 to a bondsman.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After Dog's son-in-law, Travis, signs off on an iffy bond and the accused turns into a fugitive, Dog and Beth decide to bring Travis on his first bounty. What better way to teach him than to show him just how hard it can be to bring in your man!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that it is better to give than to receive, so when a fellow bondsman grieving for his recently departed spouse requests his help, he jumps into action. While studying the fugitive's file, the team uncovers a surprising fact.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: No one becomes a bondsman overnight and even the members of Dog's team know there is always more to learn. So when Duane Lee cuts a felon a little too much slack about checking-in and then goes missing, Duane Lee knows he's gonna get schooled.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What starts out as a perfect day for Dog turns ugly fast. He and Beth are enjoying helping their kids learn how to care for their new pets, when duty calls for a tough case. The charges: alleged cruelty to animals.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In between tracking down a potentially dangerous ex-con facing a five-year stretch in the big house, Leland is struggling to find time to train and compete for his first boxing match in years.

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Dog butt surfs; goat jumps off trampoline after owner; dog gets mail; lizard attacks stuffed ape; dog hides in couch.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: The Green have a new addition to their farm – a tiny kitten they've called Magic. He arrived at Jean and Steve's after being found on his own by a main road in the middle of the night.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Mangalitsa pig breeder Lisa is worried about her boar Hal, who has a large lump on his neck. A famous client brings their dog to the practice. Matt is in uncharted waters as he heads to a local college to operate on one of their fish.

programme.title: Pet Obsessed: Four Paw Entertainment
programme.desc: These pets deserve to take home a golden bone.

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers
programme.desc: In Northampton Inspector Michelle McNab answers a call from a woman who wants to sign her dog over to the RSPCA, but when she arrives, the living conditions are jaw-dropping and the dog is extremely unhealthy.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Peter treats two very poorly newborn calves. Julian tries to remove a huge tumour from a sheepdog and a sparky Shetland pony gives the vets the runaround.

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Presley in the toilet; raccoon and dog tug of fight over towel hanging from wall; raccoon looks like he's trying to use toilet and ends up slipping in.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Peter is called out to an emergency at Richard Todd’s farm to help a pregnant Ewe in distress. Peter will have to be quick or else both the lamb and the Ewe will be lost. It will be a race against time to deliver the lamb alive and save mum.

programme.title: Breeder of the Pack
programme.desc: The Dogue de Bordeaux breed has had a tough time through history. These gentle giants have twice been brought to the brink of extinction at the hands of French Revolutionaries and Nazi soldiers - with only eight dogs left in the world after WWII.

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People

programme.title: Pet Heroes
programme.desc: An elderly couple find themselves trapped during a freak storm and must rely on their trusty dog to get them to safety. And the quick thinking of a blind woman’s service cat saves her from a rampaging fire.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: To secure financing for his bankrupt company, Blake arranges to see Billy Waite, a notoriously underhanded oil man. Jeff continues his search for Fallon. Impatient with the progress her lawyer is making on her defense, Alexis fires Warren Ballard.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: In Seattle, Jeff and Blake learn the woman who died in the plane crash with Peter DeVilbis cannot be positively identified, but the ring she was wearing is indeed Fallon's wedding band. Back in Denver, Fallon's moving funeral is held.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake visits Dominique at La Mirage to discuss her recent revelation. She tells Blake that her mother was a long-time mistress of his father and has evidence to prove it. At Alexis' trial, a neighbor offers powerful evidence that incriminates Alexis.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: On the witness stand, Steven testified he saw Alexis push Mark to his death. Jeff sees other women in an attempt to forget Fallon but remains obsessed with his ex-wife. Alexis takes the stand and testifies.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Adam and Dex vow to prove Alexis' innocence and begin a determined campaign. The woman who testified she had seen Alexis on the terrace with Mark had hosted a party that evening and snapped photographs.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Amanda insists Alexis acknowledge their relationship and begs her to reveal her father's identity. Alexis tells her it was simply an anonymous ski instructor in Gstaad. Steven and Alexis reconcile.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake offers to help Amanda find her father. Claudia goes out with Dean to dinner, while Steven rejects Luke. Jeff ends up sleeping with Nicole. Dominique goes to Istanbul to meet with Rashid Ahmed.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle goes into premature labor and delivers a baby girl, who suffers from respiratory problems. She names the child Kristina after a friend who once saved her life. Claudia is uneasy when Steven accompanies Luke on a business trip.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Upon learning that he may be Amanda's father, Blake resolves to ask Amanda to take a blood test. Nicole tells Jeff there's a chance Peter DeVilbis may have been with another woman at the time of the crash.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake buys back his racehorse Allegre from owner Daniel Reece, who sends Krystle a gift. Furious, she demands to know how he dared approach her after what happened with her sister, Iris. Amanda learns she is Blake's daughter.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle reconciles with Daniel, who reveals that his break-up with her sister was amicable. Claudia moves into La Mirage. Krystle confides to Steven that Daniel is Sammy Jo's father and therefore little Danny's grandfather.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Claudia rebuffs Steven's conciliatory attempts. Tension between Dex and Amanda continues to mount. On his deathbed, Tom Carrington makes amends with Blake, and in a final dramatic gesture, has his will changed.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle begins working with Daniel. Blake is adamantly opposed and exchanges harsh words with Reece. Dex is furious with Alexis for traveling to Sumatra to see Blake's father. Alexis learns from Amanda about Dex's experience with Daniel in Vietnam.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle launches her new business with the purchase of an Arabian horse. Sexual tension between Steven and Luke mounts. Jeff and Nikki return from Bolivia with the news of their marriage and they move into the mansion.

programme.title: EPIC SAFARI ENCOUNTERS
programme.desc: Kristina continues her stay at the Hide Safari Camp with Sean. Cecil's pride is still in the area scouting for prey. Sean teaches Kristina about elephant anatomy and wild dogs take down an impala and mate right outside camp.

programme.title: Disruptive Nature
programme.desc: 2018 Japan Floods and Landslide; heavy downpours in southwestern Japan resulted in widespread, devastating floods and mudflows.

programme.title: Across The World With Te Radar
programme.desc: Te Radar finds the Navajo Indians have a respect for Mother Earth we could all learn from and he goes back to class to find out when it comes to land the more you put in, the more you get out.

programme.title: EPIC SAFARI ENCOUNTERS
programme.desc: Kristina travels back to Mana Pools to experience the untamed wilderness in the extreme dry season. Her guide, Cloud, takes her on an expedition to find lion cubs and wild dog puppies. Will they find what they are looking for?

programme.title: Across The World With Te Radar
programme.desc: It’s back to the future as Te Radar visits Houston, Texas – the birthplace of American oil - to see how the DeLorean made famous by Michael J Fox has been rescued from the scrap heap and is now leading the way in cool electric transport.

programme.title: Top Dive Sites
programme.desc: Zanzibar

programme.title: Across The World With Te Radar
programme.desc: Deploying his own tracking device, Te Radar tries to find out what happens to rubbish that washes into waterways and finds himself shocked by how much plastic floats across the world’s oceans only to soil pristine beaches in the South Pacific.

programme.title: Across The World With Te Radar
programme.desc: Global Radar is looking for ways we can keep modern life powered up while the impact on the planet is dialed down and that means riding a solar bus quietly moving people around an Australian city.

programme.title: Aging In The Wild
programme.desc: In this episode, we take a deep and entertaining look at the challenges faced by those in power...and what it takes to stay there.

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: Dr. Greg forces the students to attend a local Heritage Festival – something none of them are in the mood for on their 'day off'. But will their attitudes change after witnessing the South African dance and folk customs?

programme.title: Asia - Secret Lives, Hidden Places
programme.desc: One of the world's most diverse reef systems off the coast of Borneo has just become protected - Tun Sakaran Marine Park. It's a magical paradise where an ancient volcano once erupted.

programme.title: Turkey - Beautiful Diversity

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: Travelling an incredible, 3500 miles through rivers and streams, salmon are Alaska's hardiest resident. But there is one grizzly hazard they face right at the end of their journey. It's the brown bears.

programme.title: The Great Way
programme.desc: We travel to the Far East to discover the Kumano Kodo, an ancient pilgrimage through the sacred mountains and temples of Kumano on the Kii Peninsula, which take us to ancient and rural Japan on a spiritual path of purification.

programme.title: EXTRAORDINARY HUMANS
programme.desc: Thom Hunt meets a man who claims to have a skull capable of withstanding extreme forces; Li Xin demonstrates this by performing a headstand on the tip of a nine-inch nail.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Griselda enfurece al sorprender a su hija con el novio. Reinaldo auxilia la van de Griselda y ella se pone nerviosa. Gabriel confiesa que muere de amor. Esther le propone a Juan Pablo tener un hijo, con ayuda de la doctora Alba.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Descubren que Teresa Cristina asesinó a su madre mientras estaba en una clínica psiquiátrica. Reinaldo llama a Griselda en plena madrugada para resolver una emergencia en el restaurante. Ella acude emocionada y Teresa Cristina los sorprende.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Gabriel besa a Griselda y ella lo echa de su casa con una llave inglesa. Reinaldo le envía un ramo de flores a Griselda como agradecimiento por la ayuda en el restaurante. Antonio y Patricia se cruzan con Amalia y él finge que es una vecina.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Víctor amenaza a Marisa con quitarle lo que más le duele y su estatus migratorio tambalea. Marisa teme perjudicar a la familia Parker, pero no puede reprimir sus sentimientos. El espionaje de Cristóbal y Lucas en los laboratorios se torna peligroso.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Cristóbal desenmascara a la doctora del laboratorio y descubre que hombres poderosos están por detrás del negocio sucio. Cristóbal sorprende a Marisa, mientras Sara usa a Yaya para perjudicarla. Lalo se prepara para su presentación.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Cristóbal y Marisa deciden seguir con su relación formal. Yaya inventa calumnias sobre Marisa para mantener el interés de Sara y ella no pierde tiempo para difamarla ante Cristóbal. Lalo se anota su primer triunfo entre los estudiantes superdotados.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Los comentarios venenosos de Sara tienen a Cristóbal confundido. Yaya está convencida que, tras el escándalo, Cristóbal elegirá a Sara y Marisa regresará con Víctor. Belinda no puede evitar su atracción por Goyo. Víctor enfrenta a Cristóbal.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Sebastián no aguanta las intrigas en torno a Alicia, no sabe a qué atenerse y siente que tiene que hacer algo al respecto, mientras Perfecta no quiere separarse de sus nietos.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Sebastián intenta convencer a Alicia para llegar a un acuerdo que alivie el gran conflicto en su familia, pero la tensión aumenta cuando él reacciona de una forma inexplicable.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia desconoce todas las prohibiciones de Justino cuando él delira por una crisis de su enfermedad. Iluminada siembra dudas en Sebastián, mientras los gemelos hablan entre ellos de su madre.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Sebastián discute con Alicia cuando ve a Dimas salir de la casa de Briñón. A Justino no le queda mucho tiempo de vida, si no acepta la ayuda médica, pero el doctor tiene otros intereses.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Reinaldo ve a Griselda bañándose desnuda en el mar y la imagen lo marca. Antonio busca a una actriz profesional para que se haga pasar por su madre durante la cena de compromiso. Griselda vuelve a la Mansión Palmer para arreglar una llave del baño.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Griselda enfurece al sorprender a su hija con el novio. Reinaldo auxilia la van de Griselda y ella se pone nerviosa. Gabriel confiesa que muere de amor. Esther le propone a Juan Pablo tener un hijo, con ayuda de la doctora Alba.

programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on a building ledge as a wind and rain storm inhibits their movement. Contestants must bob their heads into a container to retrieve cockroaches with their mouths. Couples will be on their stomachs on a flash flood set.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: A crane will be driving alongside the edge of a berth with its boom arm extended out over the berth. Contestants will start this stunt by jumping into garbage, retrieving items. 2 contestants will hold onto ski lines connected to the helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants support one another while leaning out over each side of a boat. Each contestant will be lying in a vertical position and rotated head over feet. Each contestant will be in a car and on go will back off the flatbed trucks.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The parents my make their way across the ledge of the Universal Orlando while their child stands on their shoulders. The mother son team must retrieve keys. Contestants are seated in a car and must and lock it into position underneath a moving semi-truck.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Five contestants will be seated in derby cars while their partners balance on top of 30-foot poles. The contestants will maneuver a swamp boat using a gondolier's staff through a swamp obstacle course.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will both start on a SeaDoo as they speed towards a buoy, jump off at the buoy, grab a floating fire extinguisher, and swim to a platform behind a house boat that is on fire. One contestant will be placed in a Plexiglas box filled with bugs.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Both contestants are trapped in cars that are each suspended by cranes opposing each other. The female contestant will be locked to a conveyer belt that will be lowered into a shaft filled with hundreds of webs crawling with thousands of tarantulas.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: One contestant will launch herself from a pneumatic chair off into the water. Couple will be placed together in a Plexiglas box with separated. One contestant will drop from a helicopter and swim over to a buoy with a key on it.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: En el paraíso de St. Martin, Tony come una saludable comida rastafari con un luchador por la libertad, ayuda a preparar la comida, descubre la comida que no está disponible en los supermercados de Estados Unidos y se relaja en un bar de la playa.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: En New Orleans, Louisiana, Tony atrapa un caimán Bayou, se refresca con helado mundialmente famoso, tiene problemas con la ley, come jambalaya con un chef bailarín y se relaja con un poco de jazz local.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Conocida como la capital de la felicidad de Brasil, Salvador da Bahía ofrece una variedad de mercados. Aquí, Tony participa en una ceremonia tradicional local y experimenta los talentos culinarios del famoso artista de la cocina bahiana: el chef Dada.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: ¿Qué es un carioca? Los nativos son adorables bribones que encuentran formas de evitar el trabajo, prefiriendo la playa, coqueteando, frecuentando restaurantes y bares. Tony, bajo la tutela de un carioca ejemplar, prueba el estilo de vida.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Únete a Tony en su búsqueda del bar perfecto en Nueva York. Descubra la composición química correcta de las bebidas, las alegrías de los bares de mala muerte y la necesidad de aperitivos a altas horas de la noche.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A wealthy man and his wife were attacked by three masked men outside their luxurious Louisiana home. He was shot dead and she was forced to open their hidden safe. To solve the crime, police would have to find out who knew about the concealed safe.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace. Even though foul play is suspected, the leads don't pan out and the trail turns cold. Twenty years would pass before police are able to link a clump of hair discovered in an isolated area with the missing woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a talented television news anchor is shot to death outside her home, it appears to be a crime of passion perpetrated by an obsessed fan.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: There was no clear reason for a young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the coroner discovered a tiny clue during the autopsy, investigators were able to uncover a mystery filled with betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman appears to have lost control of her SUV and plunged down an embankment into a shallow creek. But investigators suspect foul play when they find snowy footprints leading away from the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Leann Fletcher is found dead, investigators use blood spatter analysis and forensic computing to find a motive for her murder: her husband, a prominent lawyer, was having an affair with judge Susan Chrzanowski.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Just weeks before a witness is to testify against the man accused of sexually assaulting her, she is murdered in the front yard of her own home. Investigators immediately suspect her attacker, but they don't have enough evidence to prove his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman who was known to have suffered from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police that, a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her there would be a note in the china cabinet.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the head chef of a historic Philadelphia restaurant was found dead, investigators interviewed the usual suspects: family, friends and coworkers. As they sifted through the evidence, police uncovered a chilling tale of debt and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After inspecting storm damage to a home in Tampa, an insurance assessor simply disappeared. Thirty hours later, her body was found in a nearby river. But the killer had been careless.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Colorado hunter is the victim of a well-planned crime. Investigators suspect two weapons and two killers. But forensic evidence points them in a different direction — one much closer to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman was found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas. The grass on that course was so distinctive, it had evidentiary value. The evidence led police to two suspects, each of whom blamed the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1988, when a patient dies unexpectedly in the office of California neurologist Richard Boggs, police begin what they think will be a routine investigation. Soon they uncover a bizarre story of corpse stealing, fake identity and sexual perversion.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is reported missing after a fight with her husband. Police suspect a man who reported a fire in his car. Two tiny drops of blood are found in the interior. Finally, a tiny clue inside the suspect's watchband helps solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, Maine resident Pearl Smith goes missing after an argument with her husband, Bill Bruns. When investigators find a blood trail that leads to the couple's basement, police are sure they'll find the victim's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a day of fishing in a quiet village in Switzerland, a teenage boy doesn't return home as planned. The investigation reveals some important microscopic evidence in the water near where he was last seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A teenager went missing after an evening of horseback riding. Her body was found a month later, three miles from her home. But the killer unknowingly left trace evidence behind.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police find the body of 11-year-old Krista Harrison, there are few clues to the killer's identity. But authorities are intrigued by unusual orange fibers embedded in clothing found near the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It would take 46 years, handwriting analysis and new fingerprint technology to solve the 1957 murders of two California police officers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1989, 4-year-old April Loveless was found dead in the backyard of her Texas home. Her parents told police that she was attacked and killed by wild dogs. Investigators did not agree.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of 16-year-old Leanne Tiernan was discovered nine months after she disappeared. Forensic scientists found clues that painted a virtual portrait of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2008, college co-ed Jenna Verhaalen was found dead in her Bryan, Texas apartment. Petechial hemorrhages in her eyes indicated that she was strangled.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A bomb, constructed to cause as much damage as possible, kills a victim with deadly force and flame. When a painstaking search yields some tiny clues, police are able to identify the killer as surely as if he'd signed them.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, when a fundamentalist group begins robbing banks near Spokane, authorities know immediately that they are dealing with experienced criminals.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this episode, the decade-old murder of a young Texas housewife is investigated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep and toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood. Investigators find a suicide note and presume he killed himself until a forensic linguist examines the note.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails infiltrate Robotnik's new Casino Night Zone to stop him and his henchmen from scamming a group of sheep into becoming Robotnik's slaves.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik's insane cousin, Dr. Warpnik, captures Tails and lures Sonic into his Zone of Confusion in order to enact revenge on Robotnik for banishing him.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails help an alien prince fix his space shuttle to return to his home planet for coronation to become king or else his younger brother will be crowned in his place and destroy Mobius.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik's obnoxious mother visits her son on her birthday and expects a present. After he fails to destroy a nearby forest as a present, however, she decides to capture Sonic as her own gift.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After being exiled by Robotnik, Coconuts finds a lost baby gorilla who thinks he is his father. Coconuts attempts to use the gorilla to stop Sonic. The baby gorilla's father is under the control of Robotnik, and Sonic has to save him.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails rescue Lucas, Robotnik's first prisoner, and attempt to reunite him with his girlfriend, Lucinda. However, Robotnik is also in love with Lucinda and pursues Lucas.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: En route to stop a train of explosives from arriving at Robotnik's munition factory, Sonic and Tails must deal with a duo of bears named Big Griz and Mad Mike after Scratch and Grounder tell them that Sonic and Tails are the enemies.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When superhero Captain Rescue bungles in his attempts to help Sonic, he grows tired of his incompetence. Robotnik then uses Captain Rescue to successfully imprison Sonic in an impenetrable force field, and Tails and Captain Rescue must save him.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Scratch suffers a blow to the head and believes that he is his favorite television character, Edgar Eagle. Sonic uses this to his advantage in preventing another of Robotnik's schemes.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: During a fair in his honor, Sonic's shoes are stolen and he and Tails use detective intellect to try and solve the whodunit case.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Tails adopts a squishy creature from another dimension named Goobster, who turns out to be a black hole.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Momma Robotnik visits her son, and after he fails once again, she disowns him and decides to adopt Sonic as her son to capture him.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Grounder accidentally puts a "genius chip"in his head and it makes him so smart that he easily captures Sonic and even takes over Robotnik's operations.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Scratch and Grounder zap Sonic with Robotnik's new freeze ray, Tails uses intellect and disguises to foil the two henchmen and ensure Sonic's safety.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik introduces the "Ultra Freeze-O-Matic", announcing his plan to freeze every citizen on Mobius so that he can install "Servitude Chips"into the frozen citizens and make them unquestionably obedient. Sonic and Tails must foil the scheme.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik constructs a robot son in order to help him with his conquest of Mobius. Robotnik Jr., however, is inspired by Sonic, and helps him thwart his latest plan.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik makes chewing gum that makes the consumer as fast as Sonic. Robotnik gives it to Grounder, but he loses and Tails gets a hold of it.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After a disastrous failed mission, Sonic laments that they can't go back and prevent Robotnik's takeover.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Mechagodzilla 2
programme.desc: Mechagodzilla® is the ultimate in Godzilla®-busting weaponry. Fueled by a nuclear reactor and sheathed in a synthetic diamond shield, the mammoth metal robot is Japan's greatest hope for ending Godzilla®'s reign of terror.

programme.title: Rebirth of Mothra

programme.title: Rebirth of Mothra 2
programme.desc: Two young kids inadvertently unleash a giant sea creature which is strengthened from the abundance of modern-day pollution. Mothra's keepers, the tiny twins Moll and Lora, quickly rouse the gentle giant in order to combat this latest threat to peace.

programme.title: Rebirth of Mothra 3
programme.desc: In the final film in the new 'Mothra' trilogy, King Ghidorah, the most destructive of all the monsters, returns to destroy the Earth. In the end, Mothra is indeed triumphant and takes her place among the greatest of all monsters.

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Spacegodzilla

programme.title: Godzilla Vs. Megaguirus: The G Annihilation Strategy

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: Sonia viaja al este de Mobius para visitar a su amiga Mindy en la residencia de los LaTour.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: Sleet y Dingo planean recolectar los impuestos que el Duque de Velcronia le debe a Robotnik y quedarse con el dinero.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: El siniestro Robotnik chantajea a Cyrus, un antiguo amigo de Sonic, manteniendo a su padre cautivo.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: Mientras visitan Puerto Mobius, Sonic, Manic y Sonia se enteran de que una gran bestia marina está hundiendo los barcos.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: Se rumorea que los registros reales de la Reina Aleena están enterrados debajo de un palacio en la ciudad de Tashistán.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: Sonic, Manic y Sonia andan deambulando perdidos por el desierto de Mobius cuando se topan con un oasis llamado Balneario de Lake Valley.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: Sonia está invitada a un baile de casaderas, pero antes de que la puedan anunciar oficialmente en sociedad, ella y sus hermanos Manic y Sonic tienen que cumplir una importante misión.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: Robotnik creó un robot que, según él, es tan veloz como Sonic, y está retando a todos los ciudadanos de Mobius a que compitan contra él. Sonic sospecha que se trata de una trampa, pero su orgullo es más fuerte que él.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: Los Hedgehogs reciben un mensaje que aparentemente les envió su primo. El mensaje habla sobre un castillo, y Manic y Sonia deciden investigar.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: Los Hedgehogs se roban unos artefactos históricos antes de que Robotnik pueda subastarlos para financiar la construcción de más robots.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: Los Defensores de la Libertad están siendo atacados por un enjambre de bichos robóticos.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: Robotnik desarrolla una fórmula llamada Sonic Tonic para poder correr tan rápido como Sonic y atrapar al erizo de una vez por todas.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: Sonic, Manic y Sonia se dirigen a la Isla Flotante para encontrar la esmeralda caos antes de que Robotnik lo haga.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: Los Hedgehogs encuentran un mensaje de su madre diciendo que deben ir a la Isla Súper Rápida. Allí, los secuaces de Robotnik quieren expulsar a los nativos para convertir la isla en un balneario para los ricos.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: Sonic se siente frustrado porque cree que todos sus esfuerzos de lucha son en vano. Entonces los Hedgehogs visitan al oráculo en busca de respuestas, y el oráculo promete dárselas a cambio de un acto de valor.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: Robotnik planea robarse una joya de la corona de la reina Aleena. La joya tiene la particularidad de brillar más fuerte cuanto más cerca esté de la reina, y si cae en poder de Robotnik él podría capturarla.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: Sonic, Manic y Sonia encuentran a un bebé abandonado y se lo llevan con ellos hasta que aparezcan sus padres. No sospechan que es una trampa de Robotnik para que los Hedgehogs se lleven al bebé al Santuario y así descubrir su ubicación.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: Sonic y sus hermanos viajan hasta el desierto de Mobius para reclutar a una tribu de nómades para pelear en la Resistencia.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: Sonic, Manic y Sonia se infiltran en la guarida de Robotnik para recuperar el libro 'Erizos despeinados'. El libro contiene información valiosa sobre la familia real que podría guiar a Robotnik hasta el escondite de la reina Aleena.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: Durante una visita a una prisión en busca de registros de su madre, los Hedgehogs se encuentran con un prisionero que lleva una máscara de hierro y dice ser pariente de ellos.

programme.title: Maya & Miguel
programme.desc: Maya y Miguel dividen el apartamento por la mitad para evitar chocar entre ellos, pero pronto se dan cuenta del regalo que supone tener un hermano.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: El oráculo les da una misión a los Hedgehogs para que puedan encontrar respuestas sobre el futuro: los lleva a una dimensión extraña donde Robotnik es bueno y ellos son los malos.

programme.title: Maya & Miguel

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: Las vacaciones de Sonic, Manic y Sonia se convierten en una batalla para salvar a Mobius luego de que Robotnik lanza un ataque con su nueva arma: la fortaleza de altitud.

programme.title: Maya & Miguel
programme.desc: Maya encuentra una carta olvidada en el escritorio de Miguel, dirigida a una linda chica de su clase llamada Esperanza.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda

programme.title: Maya & Miguel

programme.title: Mork & Mindy

programme.title: Happy Days

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los Chefs restantes tiran los dados para determinar qué ingredientes usar para su plato de desafío. El equipo ganador gana un viaje a Las Vegas.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los nueve Chefs restantes realizan una prueba de sabor a ciegas. Los ganadores cenan con el Chef Ramsay en un comedor completamente oscuro donde no pueden ver lo que están comiendo.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los Chefs restantes hacen crepes. Los ganadores cenarán en un restaurante francés mientras los perdedores se preparan para un servicio de cena con temática francesa.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los medallistas olímpicos de invierno Sasha Cohen y Jonny Moseley aparecen como jueces invitados. Para este desafío, todos los ingredientes deben provenir de Whistler, B.C.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los seis participantes restantes deben replicar los platos que les preparó el Chef Ramsay. Los ganadores cenarán con la ganadora de la cuarta temporada, Christina Machamer.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El desafío para cada uno de los concursantes restantes es hacer un plato que se vea y sepa igual. Los expertos de la revista 'Bon Appetit' ayudan al Chef Ramsay a juzgar.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los participantes conocen una versión en miniatura del Chef Ramsay: el actor y chico impresionista británico Felix Light. Deben preparar comidas sin carne para él y otros ochenta jóvenes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la primera parte del final de temporada, los tres concursantes restantes deberán preparar un plato con ingredientes de todo el mundo. Los jueces son un grupo de expertos culinarios internacionales.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la parte final del final de temporada, los Chefs finales deben preparar platos dignos de Araxi, el restaurante y bar de ostras donde el ganador será el Chef.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día uno
programme.desc: Doce chefs compiten para impresionar a Gordon Ramsay. Ellos trabajan para abrir un renombrado restaurante en Los Ángeles. Ahí se descubre la próxima estrella culinaria.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día dos
programme.desc: Después de apenas sobrevivir la noche de apertura del restaurante Hell's Kitchen, los concursantes se preparan para su segundo servicio de cena.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día tres
programme.desc: Los chefs se preparan para su tercer servicio de cena, pero la presión de Hell's Kitchen es demasiado para un concursante.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día cuatro
programme.desc: Los concursantes intentan recrear los platos característicos de Gordon para un público exigente de Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día cinco
programme.desc: Las tensiones surgen en la cocina durante la noche italiana. En el restaurante hay un equipo que quiere ganar jugando sucio.

programme.title: Jamie's Festive Feast
programme.desc: Jamie’s Festive Feast is a celebration of those lazy winter days at the end of the year. The festive period is the perfect time to kick back, spend some quality time with family and friends, and cook up some amazing dishes.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Perfect Christmas

programme.title: Mary Berry's Absolute Favourites
programme.desc: In tonight’s first programme, Mary draws on inspiration from some of her earliest and fondest memories from her childhood holidays and regular trips to the British seaside.

programme.title: Mary Berry's Absolute Favourites
programme.desc: Tonight Mary is inspired by her love of the great British countryside. Brought up in the country, Mary still loves to go walking with her dogs and family, as well as forage for wild ingredients.

programme.title: Mary Berry's Absolute Favourites
programme.desc: Tonight Mary takes inspiration from the herb garden. Only dried herbs were available when Mary started cooking, but these days there is an abundance of fresh herbs that can turn an ordinary dish into something spectacular.

programme.title: Mary Berry's Absolute Favourites
programme.desc: One of Mary’s pleasures is to shop for fresh, exciting, seasonal ingredients, and tonight; it’s the local farmers' market that inspires Mary.

programme.title: Mary Berry's Absolute Favourites
programme.desc: Tonight Mary takes inspiration from a great British tradition, growing your own on the allotment. Mary’s father turned his flowerbeds over to growing veg for the war effort and ever since then, Mary has been hooked on growing her own fruit and veg.

programme.title: Mary Berry's Absolute Favourites
programme.desc: Mary cooks dishes inspired by her home and family. No matter how busy Mary is, her top priority is to have the family round for a meal, and tonight, three generations of Mary’s family visit her in the kitchen and get involved with the cooking.

programme.title: Mary Berry's Absolute Favourites
programme.desc: In tonight's first episode Mary shows us how to prepare and get ahead for the Christmas season. Being such a busy time of year, it's ideal to have just the right dish on standby.

programme.title: Mary Berry's Absolute Favourites
programme.desc: Like many, Christmas is Mary Berry’s favourite time of year. But all that cooking and preparation comes with a lot of pressure. No matter how many times you’ve cooked for it before, it can all seem a bit daunting.

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers' Christmas Party

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Por un precio, todo es posible. Los asesinatos por encargo surgieron de la necesidad de establecer la coartada perfecta. Al contratar a alguien para hacer el trabajo sucio, una persona puede desviar la culpa.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Al principio, cuando David Wilkey fue asesinado de un disparo en la zona rural de Virginia en 1983, pareció un accidente trágico de cacería. Un tenaz investigador de seguros sospechó de una maniobra sucia, pero no tenía pruebas concluyentes.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Un fin de semana del Día del Trabajador se convirtió en una pesadilla de homicidios mientras una ola de crímenes tenía aterrorizado a todo el país.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1992, una madre joven fue baleada frente a su hijo. La policía buscó respuestas, pero no encontró ninguna. El horrible crimen parecía carente de motivo y sentido, solo por azar.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso de robo es perseguido por oficiales. Después de dejar caer una bolsa de metanfetamina, un hombre jura no reconocerla. Un sospechoso de violencia doméstica dice que fue en defensa propia.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un pasajero se escapa de un auto robado que huye. Un oficial trabaja en una operación secreta de prostitución. Una mujer es atrapada con drogas luego de llamar a la policía por su marido peleón.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un policía juega al portero cuando atrapa a un ladrón corriendo hacia él. Víctimas de ladrones armados describen con detalle el crimen que se grabó. Oficiales hacen entrega de unos niños llorando a su madre.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una mujer transgénero en silla de ruedas le da su merecido a un agresor. Los oficiales encuentran una pareja semidesnuda mordiéndose. Un conductor imprudente se enfurece rápidamente.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has stolen the golden death mask of Tutankhamen, the ancient Egyptian pharaoh known as the "boy king." However, when Lupin tries on the golden death mask he becomes possessed by an ominous curse.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Trans Europe Superexpress train has departed Venice and is headed to France. Onboard the Superexpress is crime boss Don Marcino's ill-gotten treasures. Can Lupin and his gang pull off the heist before the train reaches its destination?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin meets the grandson of master Ukiyoe artist, Toushusai Sharaku and learns that he has been switching his own works with his grandfather's originals. Unable to switch the last painting due to illness, he asks Lupin to switch it in his stead.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko have been invited to a party hosted by Marcel Dulane, a member of Paris' high society. However, the elegant party turns out to be a trap. Fujiko is taken hostage and Lupin, with a time-bomb belt strapped to his waist…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is in Monaco to race his new toy in the Monaco Grand Prix. Or so he thought. Lupin ends up losing both his money and race car in a fixed poker game at the casino.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A rare bottle of Bordeaux, commissioned by Napoleon for his beloved wife, Josephine, is to be given to the President of the United States as a Christmas present.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A criminal gang has hidden a microfilm containing the manufacturing process for artificial diamonds, developed by NASA, in one of Inspector Zenigata's molars. Determined to get his hands on that microfilm, Lupin must capture Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Forward Hees, the world's richest man, suddenly dies a mysterious death and leaves a large ruby to Fujiko in his will. After inheriting the ruby, Fujiko comes down with the same mysterious fever as Hees…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A Count challenges Lupin to steal a gemstone named Dracula's Tear from on board his airship, the Hendenburg. However, also on board the ship are several formidable detectives: Homes III, Detective Archer, Koojisuke Kaneda and Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is suffering from Transformation Sickness, an illness that transforms him into a cruel, cold-blooded criminal at the stroke of midnight, and leaves him with no recollection of his murderous crime spree in the morning…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A small Arab nation has received a blackmail notice. Pay a $100 million or have their oil fields blown up. Lupin targets the money, but his plans are hindered when he finds out the culprits are using human bombs.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Black Panther, the world's largest emerald, gets its name from the black panther that appears inside it when a light shines on it at a particular angle. After capturing this one-of-a-kind emerald, Lupin hides it in a museum to retrieve it later…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Vault maker Marukin Safe Company is forced into bankruptcy after Lupin cracks open their impenetrable safes. To test his own skills, Marukin's son challenges Lupin to open a safe he has designed…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: While trying to snag General Hatler's prize medallion, which contains a fifty-carat ruby, Lupin inadvertently reels in Hatler's biggest secret, his toupee! An enraged General Hatler orders Lupin and his gang to be killed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Upon returning to Japan, Goemon finds his master on the brink of death. Furthermore, Jinkuro, a fellow disciple, had stolen half of the scroll containing the Secret Arts of the Iga Ninja. Will Goemon be able to avenge his master?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen are in a remote area pursing a mysterious treasure, when they save a woman being chased by hoodlums. The woman invites the two back to her sister's manor, which is full of beautiful women…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A mysterious woman who claims to be Fujiko's aunt, gives Lupin an ultimatum: Find Marshal Rommel's lost gold or die! First, Lupin must decipher the location of the gold, written in ancient hieroglyphs.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The great thief Nezumi-Kozou Jirokichi IV appears before Goemon and reveals that their ancestors competed in the first International Thieves Championship together, but were defeated by Lupin's grandfather, Arsène Lupin…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The warden of an African prison is holding Fujiko captive. Lupin and his gang infiltrate the prison and attempt to break Fujiko out, but they become the target of the Iron Lizards, robotic devices developed to chase down fugitives!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Linda, a beautiful dancer, has stolen Jigen's heart and a vengeful Meyer has taken Fujiko hostage. Believing the women they love are in danger and unaware that Linda and Meyer are working together, Lupin and Jigen are set up to kill each other…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: According to legend, a stamp named the Cinderella Shadow is said to make its owner a princess. Lupin and his gang pull off the heist, but a girl name Alice who also wants the stamp tags along. Will the little girl get her royal wish?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has sent a notice declaring he will steal all the cash from every bank in Paris. Detective Melon, the granddaughter of Inspector Garimard, is chosen to catch Lupin alongside Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has many secret techniques up his sleeve, and one of them is his Levitation Technique. In order to get their hands on this technique, a crime syndicate plots a dirty trick, where a fake Lupin tortures a man known as X8 and frames the real Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Inspector Zenigata get kidnapped and the two are forcibly conscripted into the Foreign Legion in Morocco. Lupin and Inspector Zenigata make a run for it, but not before they're shackled together at the neck.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Beautiful Swedish twins, Latica and Anita, are engaged in a battle to the death over the Viking treasure map concealed on their backs. In disguise, Lupin learns the map's secret, but the map possesses an additional secret.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A hit has been ordered on Lupin and Puma, a formidable hitman who specializes in long-range attacks, is on his trail! Lupin takes his chances with a close range, one-on-one showdown against Puma, but the plan seemingly backfires and Lupin is shot…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Orion's Crown has been stolen and is up for grabs at a black-market auction. Lupin has his eyes on both the crown and the auction money, but first he must outsmart the other parties vying for the crown, including Fujiko.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/11/21: Rafael Devers launches a three-run home run in the 3rd inning, then Kiké Hernández lifts a walk-off sacrifice fly in the 9th inning to take down the Rays and send the Red Sox to the American League Championship Series.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/12/2021: The Braves win the 2021 NLDS in four games thanks to Freddie Freeman's first home run of the postseason, a go-ahead shot off Josh Hader in the bottom of the 8th inning.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/14/2021: The Dodgers beat the Giants, 2-1, in Game 5 of the 2021 National League Division Series thanks to an RBI single from Cody Bellinger in the top of the 9th inning and an unlikely save from Max Scherzer.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/15/2021: Jose Altuve ties the game with his 20th career postseason homer, then Carlos Correa hits a go-ahead shot in the 7th inning to lead the Astros to a Game 1 victory over the Red Sox.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/16/2021: Austin Riley leads the way and goes 2-for-4 with a solo home run and a walk-off RBI single, helping the Braves beat the Dodgers in Game 1 of the 2021 National League Championship Series.

programme.title: MST3K: Time Chasers
programme.desc: A college professor and a reporter go through time in a modified light plane to stop a corporation from using his invention to accidentally create a dystopian future.

programme.title: MST3K: Racket Girls
programme.desc: A gym owner gets into trouble, becoming the target of the mob and the law. The 1950 short presents a high school couple rushing into marriage, and the marriage counselor who talks them out of it.

programme.title: MST3K: Tormented
programme.desc: In Tormented, jazz pianist Tom Stewart, soon to marry the woman he loves, watches former love Vi Mason fall from a lighthouse and does not save her. Vi’s spirit returns and begins to torment Tom at his every step.

programme.title: MST3K: Radar Secret Service
programme.desc: Mike and the bots learn the art of safe driving and why you should pay attention at railroad crossings in the 1959 short, Last Clear Chance. Later, they watch government agents use radar technology to catch criminals in Radar Secret Service.

programme.title: MST3K: Robot Holocaust
programme.desc: After the ninth chapter of Radar Men From The Moon (1952) ends in technical difficulties, Joel and the bots must endure Robot Holocaust (1986). They pretend to be characters from the movie, but Tom Servo is the only one who is into it.

programme.title: MST3K: The Beast Of Yucca Flats
programme.desc: After a devastating atomic test, Joseph Javorsky, a defecting Russian scientist, is transformed into a murderous radioactive beast. Can desert patrolmen Jim Archer and Joe Dobson stop the creature before it kills again?

programme.title: MST3K: The Beatniks
programme.desc: When a hold-up carried out by his two-bit hoodlum friends goes tragically awry, Eddie Craneâ€™s bright future as a recording artist from the mean streets could be in jeopardy.

programme.title: MST3K: The Brain That Wouldn't Die
programme.desc: New guy Mike Nelson finishes his training and makes his way into the theater. His first outing is the movie The Brain That Wouldn't Die

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la Biblia se relata una historia en la cual Jesús y sus discípulos un día se toparon con un paria que se encontraba poseído. Cuando Jesús le preguntó a ese hombre cómo se llamaba, este le respondió que, dentro de él.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La dinámica de las personas que viven bajo un mismo techo debe tener un equilibrio delicado. Mike y su novia, Lisa, mantienen una relación sana y, sin nada que les preocupe, se mudan juntos, pero no están solos en su nueva casa.

programme.title: Cazadores de ovnis
programme.desc: Seis naves (con forma de rosquilla) fueron vistas frente a la costa de la Isla Maury, Washington, una semana antes del accidente de ovni reportado en Roswell. Harold Dahl y su hijo fueron testigos de la aeronave bailando en forma desconocida.

programme.title: Cazadores de ovnis
programme.desc: En 1956, se detectó un objeto sobre el Mar del Norte que se dirigía a la base de la RAF de Bentwaters, una base con armas nucleares. Dos cazas Venom hicieron contacto con el objeto, pero sus armas y sistemas eléctricos quedaron inutilizados.

programme.title: Archivos de ovni
programme.desc: Roswell evoca el caso de ovni más famoso en la historia de los Estados Unidos, atrayendo a los creyentes en una búsqueda interminable. ¿Podría Canadá tener uno verdadero, un caso de ovni con un rastro certificable?

programme.title: Estado paranormal
programme.desc: Estado paranormal viaja hasta el rancho de Gilliland en el estado de Washington, un semillero de actividad paranormal inexplicable que incluye posibles ovnis en el cielo y criaturas aladas en el bosque.

programme.title: Estado paranormal
programme.desc: La jubilada Carol Ann se mantiene despierta todas las noches grabando las voces de los muertos. ¿Está simplemente documentando o proporcionando un portal para las fuerzas oscuras ansiosas de cruzar?

programme.title: Más allá de la realidad: realidad o ficción
